info.name: SomSpot API
info.description:
SomSpot (taatiko12) backend — consumer, merchant & creator APIs. Set {{baseUrl}} and the role tokens after logging in.

Localization: send header `x-language: en|so|ar` on any request to get localized success/error messages. The user's language is also stored at signup (register / phone request-otp `language` field) and used for outgoing emails.

variable.description: The User _id (not the Creator profile id) of a creator to invite in campaign/create's invitedCreator field

request.description: Copy data.accessToken into {{userToken}}.
Returns { authId, userId, email, role, isProfileComplete, missing[] }. Call after login; source of truth for profile completion (not in the JWT).
Dev returns data.devCode. role can be USER | MERCHANT | CREATOR.
Copy data.accessToken to the matching role token.
slug is optional — auto-derived (slugified) from name if omitted. order controls display order (default 0).
Public. Always scoped to isActive=true (cannot be overridden via query).

formdata.description: Optional — used for geo search + timezone lookup
Optional IANA tz — overrides lat/lng auto-lookup
JSON string. day enum: sun|mon|tue|wed|thu|fri|sat. open/close are "HH:mm" local time; closed:true marks a day off.
Optional — up to 8 images. Add more rows with the same key to upload multiple.

request.description: multipart/form-data. Do not set Content-Type manually — Postman sets the multipart boundary automatically. New business always starts status=pending until an admin verifies it.

formdata.description: JSON string, same shape as create. Replaces the whole array.

request.description: multipart/form-data. Only businessId is required; every other field is optional and only applied when present. Owner or admin only.
action enum: approve | reject. When action=reject, include rejectionReason (defaults to "Not specified" if omitted).
Public. status is always forced to approved server-side. category is a Category _id (see category/get-all). lat+lng together enable geo "near me" sort within radiusKm (default 10).

formdata.value: Dine-in only. One claim per customer.

formdata.description: Optional — single image (jpeg/png/jpg/webp, max 10MB). Stored as offer.coverImage.

request.description: multipart/form-data. Do not set Content-Type manually — Postman sets the multipart boundary automatically.

query.description: Optional — Category _id; filters offers whose business belongs to this category

request.description: Public. Always scoped to status=active and endAt in the future, regardless of any status query param.
multipart/form-data. Only offerId is required. status enum (optional): active | expired | inactive.
state enum: active | expired (omit the param to get all claims).
state enum: active | expired (omit the param to get all claims).
Non-admin/super_admin callers only ever see their own reviews, regardless of filters.
Set Authorization header to REVENUECAT_WEBHOOK_AUTH value in production. app_user_id must equal the merchant's User _id.

body.raw:
{
  "business": "{{businessId}}",
  "name": "BOGO Pizza Promo",
  "about": "Promote our BOGO pizza offer.",
  "objective": "offer",
  "contentType": "reel",
  "invitedCreator": "{{creatorUserId}}",
  "videoLengthSec": 30,
  "targetCreators": 5,
  "offer": "{{offerId}}"
}

request.description: objective enum: awareness | traffic | offer | lead_generation. contentType enum: video_ad | product_review | reel | story. invitedCreator is optional (User _id of a specific creator the merchant has in mind — actual task assignment still happens via campaign/admin/assign-creator). videoLengthSec enum: 20 | 30 | 45 | 60 — pricePerClaim is NOT settable here; it's a fixed platform price derived from videoLengthSec (20s=$5, 30s=$7, 45s=$10, 60s=$15). New campaigns always start status=pending_review and need admin approval (campaign/admin/review) before they go live. Note: the subscription-entitlement gate is currently disabled in code (commented out), so no active subscription is required to create a campaign right now.

query.description: Optional — enum: pending_review | live | rejected | paused | completed

request.description: A merchant may only set status to paused or completed, and only while the campaign is already live — 403 otherwise. Approving/rejecting a pending_review campaign is admin-only (campaign/admin/review). objective enum (if changed): awareness | traffic | offer | lead_generation. contentType enum (if changed): video_ad | product_review | reel | story. invitedCreator (if changed): User _id. videoLengthSec enum (if changed): 20 | 30 | 45 | 60 — changing it re-derives pricePerClaim automatically.

query.description: Optional — enum: approved | draft_submitted | verifying | published | rejected. Tasks are created already-approved by an admin (campaign/admin/assign-creator) — there is no 'applied' state.

request.description: action enum: approve | reject. Application must currently be status=draft_submitted.
action enum: approve | reject. Application must currently be status=verifying.

query.description: Optional — enum: pending_review | live | rejected | paused | completed

request.description: Admin dashboard listing across all merchants — use status=pending_review to find campaigns awaiting approval.
action enum: approve | reject. Campaign must currently be status=pending_review. On reject, optionally include rejectionReason (defaults to "Not specified").

creatorUserId is the User _id of an account with role=CREATOR. Campaign must be status=live (already approved). Creates a task already at status=approved — the creator can submit a draft immediately, no self-application step. 409 if this creator is already assigned to the campaign.
platform enum: tiktok | instagram. Re-linking an existing platform updates handle/url.

query.description: Optional — enum: approved | draft_submitted | verifying | published | rejected

request.description: Tasks are created by an admin assigning you to a campaign (no self-service apply flow).
amount must not exceed the sum of available (unpaid) Earning docs. method is free text (e.g. evc, zaad, bank).
action enum: approve | reject. Payout must currently be status=pending.
Published creator posts for a business — powers the consumer business-detail 'Creator' tab.
role enum: USER | DRIVER | MERCHANT | CREATOR | ADMIN | SUPER_ADMIN.
status enum: pending | approved | rejected (leave blank for all).
status enum: active | expired | inactive (leave blank for all).

query.description: Optional — enum: active | expired | cancelled | none

request.description: action enum: approve | hide | delete.
audience enum (case-insensitive, optional, default ALL): ALL | USERS | MERCHANTS | INFLUENCERS | CREATORS. Any unrecognized value silently falls back to ALL.
multipart/form-data. All fields optional; only these three text fields + profile_image are applied by the service.
multipart/form-data. All fields optional — falsy/omitted fields are left unchanged.
page/limit paginate the messages array within the chat (not a QueryBuilder list).
Singleton upsert — the schema's only field is `description` (not `content`). Calling this again replaces the existing doc.

query.description: Required — copy the _id from the matching Get response

request.description: id is required (read from req.query).
